description:
You are digitizing artwork for a museum's online archive. A painting was photographed while hanging on a gallery wall (gallery_photo.jpg on your Desktop). The photograph was taken at an angle, causing the rectangular painting to appear as a trapezoid. The warm gallery lighting has also introduced a yellow-orange color cast.

Correct the perspective distortion so the painting appears as a proper rectangle, crop tightly to just the painting removing all visible wall area, scale the result to exactly 1200 pixels wide while maintaining the aspect ratio, and correct the warm color cast so the painting's colors appear neutral. Export the final result as painting_corrected.png to the Desktop.
